articles.title: A Nordic-inspired sauna just opened in the White Mountains
articles.description:
Travelers visit the spot from New England and around the world.

summary: A new Nordic-inspired sauna opened in the White Mountains, attracting local visitors.
The sauna draws travelers from New England and beyond, enhancing regional tourism.
Boston residents can enjoy a unique wellness experience just a short drive away.

articles.title: What Patriots coach Mike Vrabel said about viral photos with NFL reporter
articles.description:
“These photos show a completely innocent interaction and any suggestion otherwise is laughable," he said.

The post What Patriots coach Mike Vrabel said about viral photos with NFL reporter appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots coach Mike Vrabel addressed viral photos with reporter Dianna Russini on April 8.
Vrabel stated the interaction was innocent, dismissing any negative implications as laughable.
Local fans remain supportive as Vrabel clarifies the situation amid media speculation.

articles.title: Matt Damon and Noah Kahan will join forces on ‘SNL’ in May

summary: Matt Damon will host 'Saturday Night Live' on May 9, 2026.

The event highlights Boston's cultural influence in national entertainment.

articles.title: Land court backs Somerville church’s plan for homeless shelter that raised neighborhood concerns
articles.description:
Neighbors feared the “low-barrier” shelter would fuel drug activity, but the court ruled the Dover Amendment protects the church’s right to open it.

The post Land court backs Somerville church’s plan for homeless shelter that raised neighborhood concerns appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Land court supports Somerville church's homeless shelter plan despite neighborhood concerns.
Court ruling cites the Dover Amendment, ensuring the church's right to operate the shelter.
Local residents express fears of increased drug activity near the low-barrier shelter.
